archetype: Electric & Neon / True Grey High Contrast

headings.usage: Landing page hero, dashboard section titles, wizard step titles.

data_numerics.usage: Tables, PAN numbers, GST numbers, Rupee values, calculators, investment metrics.

visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use cyan/blue glowing radial gradients placed behind key components (like the login gate or active chart) with blur-3xl and opacity-20.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px subtle borders (border-zinc-800) for all cards. Use borderless cards with elevation tokens (lightness shifts) for dense tables.

grids_and_layouts.landing_page: Full viewport height. Auto-playing CSS motion-graphic background using absolute positioning. Centered JWT login gate with glassmorphism overlapping the background. Top right 'Skip Intro' button.
grids_and_layouts.dashboard_shell: Vertical left sidebar (w-64 or w-20 collapsed) with 6 prominent section icons. Top header for user profile and global search. Main content area uses p-6 or p-8.
grids_and_layouts.bento_grids: Investment & Tax summaries should use varied column spans (e.g., col-span-2 row-span-2 for main chart, col-span-1 for metrics).
grids_and_layouts.stepper_wizards: 4-step wizards for Income Tax, GST, Cost Audit. Use horizontal stepper at the top with a cyan 'tracing beam' connecting the completed steps. Step content in a central max-w-4xl card.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with a cyan border glow. Buttons scale active state (scale-95).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out' for colors and opacity. Do NOT use 'transition: all' globally in CSS.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up (translate-y-4 to 0, opacity 0 to 1) for dashboard widgets.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text against #09090b passes WCAG AA. Use text-zinc-400 minimum for secondary text.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add data-testid attributes (kebab-case) to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs).

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or rounded-md. Primary: bg-cyan-600 text-white hover:bg-cyan-500 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(6,182,212,0.4)]. Secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-100.
components.tables: Dense rows. Hover state: bg-zinc-800/50. Header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 border-b border-zinc-800.
components.charts: Dark background compatible. Use Recharts. Lines: #06b6d4, #3b82f6. Grids: #27272a (strokeDasharray 3 3).

media_and_libraries.3d_libraries: Not heavily required unless using tsParticles for the cinematic landing page background.

image_urls.description: Abstract neon data visualization for the cinematic intro/login gate background.
Dark blue tech abstract background for the AI Wealth Advisor card.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Use sonner for toasts, located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js
Always add data-testid attributes to interactive and key data elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: react-icons, lucide-react, recharts, framer-motion, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Use .js extension for all React components. Do not use TypeScript.
Apply Outfit font for all headings and Manrope for body text. Load JetBrains Mono for tables, data cells, and calculators.
Design the Landing Page as a cinematic gate. A full-screen dark background with animated floating elements, centering a glassmorphic JWT login panel.
Dashboard should have a sidebar navigation with 6 distinct sections. Use 'true grey' (#09090b) for the app background, and (#18181b) for cards.
Implement the 4-step wizards using a clear horizontal stepper at the top of the wizard container.
For the AI Wealth Advisor section, use a subtle glowing neon border to signify 'AI intelligence'.
Ensure all semantic colors (green/refund, red/due, yellow/mismatch) have at least 10% opacity backgrounds to pop against the dark mode.
Use purely structural HTML + Tailwind for the marketing landing page, and Shadcn-like customized components for the dashboard internals.
general_ui_ux_design_guidelines: Adopt an 'Electric & Neon' archetype adapted for heavy data. Do not over-saturate backgrounds; keep backgrounds deep zinc/black and reserve cyan/blue exclusively for active states, CTAs, and hover glows. Ensure optical alignment in tables, right-aligning numerical data. Use negative space aggressively between bento grid items to reduce cognitive overload for complex tax/GST sections. Avoid completely transparent backgrounds behind text. Utilize 'F-pattern' scanning for data widgets.
